category.label: Vehicles
category.description: Make/model/year comes from committed open-vehicle-db (data/makes_and_models.json). COMSCC showroom numbers are merged at build time from rules-source/vehicles-comscc-catalog.json; vehicles without a seed match use null showroom fields until the workbook seed is updated.
